extension.displayName: Cursor IME HUD（输入法状态提示）
extension.description: Semi-transparent Chinese/English IME state HUD near the caret for VS Code/Cursor on Windows. Helps identify Chinese/English input mode (输入法状态提示).
commands.toggleOverlay.title: Toggle Overlay
commands.refreshImeState.title: Refresh IME State
commands.showDiagnostics.title: Show Diagnostics
configuration.title: Cursor IME HUD
configuration.overlay.enabled.descriptio: Enable the caret-adjacent overlay in active text editors.
configuration.overlay.labelPreset.descri: Choose a built-in IME label style or use custom labels.
configuration.overlay.labelPreset.enum.c: Use the custom Chinese and English labels below.
configuration.overlay.labelPreset.enum.z: Show Chinese-character labels: 中 for Chinese mode and 英 for English mode.
configuration.overlay.labelPreset.enum.e: Show Latin-letter labels: ZH for Chinese mode and EN for English mode.
configuration.overlay.cnLabel.descriptio: Custom label shown when the detector reports Chinese input mode and labelPreset is custom.
configuration.overlay.enLabel.descriptio: Custom label shown when the detector reports English input mode and labelPreset is custom.
configuration.overlay.cnColor.descriptio: CSS color for the Chinese-mode label (e.g. #4FA6FF or rgb(79,166,255)).
configuration.overlay.enColor.descriptio: CSS color for the English-mode label (e.g. #FF6B6B or rgb(255,107,107)).
configuration.overlay.mode.markdownDescr: Overlay rendering mode. `text+icon` is reserved for future work and currently renders the same text-only HUD as `text`.
configuration.statusBar.enabled.descript: Show the current IME state in the status bar.
configuration.overlay.hideWhenEditorUnfo: Hide the editor overlay when the VS Code window loses focus.
configuration.overlay.offsetX.descriptio: Horizontal margin offset applied to the overlay.
configuration.overlay.offsetY.descriptio: Vertical margin offset applied to the overlay.
